summary.visual_rule_glasses: Clever is the only character with clear approved glasses. Other possible readings are masks, eyelids, or eye rings and are flagged.

characters.known_visual_description: Pale-faced brown monkey with heavy black emo fringe sweeping across one eye and a blue accent; black studded jacket/pants/cuffs and grey platform boots.
signature_visual_features: black emo fringe over one eye
existing_personality_information: fierce when a line is crossed
existing_relationships: member of Emo/Fusion Squad
interacts with TwoTone as stabilizer
canon_conflicts_or_uncertainties: No glasses conflict found; sleepy/defeated dark eyelids can read as shades in thumbnails only.

characters.known_visual_description: Pale-faced brown monkey with shaggy hair split vertically half jet-black and half white; standard Emo Faction body and black studded clothing.
signature_visual_features: standard pale chest and brown extremities
existing_relationships: member of Emo/Fusion Squad
steadies Moodz in Edition 4
canon_conflicts_or_uncertainties: No glasses conflict found; sleepy/defeated closed-eye shapes can read as eyewear at thumbnail size.

characters.known_visual_description: Pale-grey-faced brown monkey with glossy jet-black slicked helmet hair ending in a widow peak; heavy grey under-eye rings; black studded punk clothing.
clothing: black leather pants with silver studs
black studded biker jacket in rockstar mode
accessories: electric guitar and music notes in rockstar mode only
existing_relationships: member of Emo/Fusion Squad
canon_conflicts_or_uncertainties: Grey under-eye rings may be mistaken for goggles/glasses; bible says they are eye rings and forbids headphones.

characters.known_visual_description: Pale-faced monkey with shaggy silver-white emo fringe covering one eye, droopy grey eye bags, stitched pale chest, black studded punk outfit.
clothing: black punk pants with silver studs
existing_roles: heat vents/controlled fire role in July draft
existing_relationships: member of Emo/Fusion Squad
canon_conflicts_or_uncertainties: No glasses conflict found. Existing bible flags hoodie/orange as prior incorrect specs.

characters.known_visual_description: Chocolate-brown monkey with pale grey face/belly and starburst white hair spikes with electric-cyan streaks/root glow; black vest and white-studded punk pants.
accessories: silver gauge/plug earring in left ear
existing_catchphrases: If this helps... why not try?
existing_relationships: member of Emo/Fusion Squad
recognized Patch as an old friend in Issue 05 ledger
canon_conflicts_or_uncertainties: neonblue_18_sleepy can be visually misread as dark glasses/shades at thumbnail size, but bible describes eye bags/lids and no eyewear.
